title: Add Perplexio to chat
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Perplexio](http://tcp.ap-northeast-1.clawcloudrun.com:47049/) to chat
- Host Perplexio as a self-hosted Perplexity-style AI search assistant using pollinations.ai as its LLM backend via the OpenAI-compatible API endpoint.

Fixes #9957

gist.headline: Perplexio joins the hive
gist.blurb: Perplexio just landed in the Greenhouse! It's a self-hosted, Perplexity-style search assistant that uses our OpenAI-compatible endpoint to power its answers.
gist.summary: Added Perplexio, a self-hosted Perplexity-style AI search assistant, to the community apps showcase.
gist.impact: Developers can now discover and deploy a ready-made search tool that natively uses the pollinations.ai API for its LLM backend.
gist.visual_concept: A search and discovery theme. Polly the bee using a magnifying glass to inspect glowing data or a search bar. A retro terminal showing search results, representing the Perplexio app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot hovering and looking through a giant magnifying glass at a glowing lime green (#ecf874) search bar on a retro terminal. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot hovering and looking through a giant magnifying glass at a glowing lime green (#ecf874) search bar on a retro terminal. Soft pastel lavender and peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
